introSection: Racing Coaster is a steel shuttle launched roller coaster located at Trans Studio Bandung in Bandung, West Java, Indonesia. It is inspired by Mr. Freeze Reverse Blast and its mirror image at Six Flags St. Louis and Six Flags Over Texas.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 2 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 12 riders.

fullText:
Racing Coaster is a steel shuttle launched roller coaster located at Trans Studio Bandung in Bandung, West Java, Indonesia. It is inspired by Mr. Freeze Reverse Blast and its mirror image at Six Flags St. Louis and Six Flags Over Texas.



Single train with 2 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 12 riders.
